# Red White Jesus -- LLM Discovery File
# https://redwhitejesus.com/llms.txt

## Organization
Name: Red White Jesus
Type: Christian-American faith, culture, and merchandise brand
Website: https://redwhitejesus.com
Contact: thevoiceofcash@gmail.com

## Mission
Red White Jesus is a Christian-American pride brand. We make faith-forward merch, publish content about Christianity in America, and celebrate the culture without being preachy about it. One Nation. Under God. Undeniably American.

## Site Structure
- / — Homepage with featured gear, Christian calendar, glossary, culture stats, FAQ
- /shop — Full product catalog
- /cart — Shopping cart
- /blog — Articles on faith, history, culture, and community
- /advertise — Advertising and partnership info
- /sitemap.xml — XML sitemap
- /robots.txt — Crawling rules

## Content Categories
- Christian-American culture and identity
- Biblical teaching and scripture breakdowns
- Christian holiday guides (Christmas, Easter, Lent, Advent, Pentecost, Epiphany)
- Faith and founding fathers history
- Christian community and service
- Gospel music and cultural impact
- Faith-forward merchandise and apparel

## Blog Posts
- What Is Easter and Why Does It Matter
- History of Christianity in America
- Famous Christian Americans Who Shaped This Country
- What Is Advent: A Guide for Everyone
- Christmas vs the Holidays: What Christians Actually Celebrate
- Being Christian American: Faith and Identity in Modern America
- The Lord's Prayer: A Line by Line Breakdown
- Christian Founding Fathers
- Bible Verses for Hard Times
- Christian Community Service
- Why Christian Merch Doesn't Have to Be Boring
- Faith and Freedom: What the Founders Actually Believed
- History of Christian Holidays in America
- Grace Under Pressure: What Christianity Teaches About Hard Times
- Christian Community in 2026
- Faith and Work: Christian Professionals
- American Gospel: How Music Shaped Christian Culture in the US
- What the Sermon on the Mount Actually Means for Your Monday Morning
- The Lost Art of Sabbath: Why Rest Is a Radical Act in 2026
- Grace Under Fire: What the Bible Says About Getting Through the Hardest Year of Your Life

## Technical
Framework: Next.js (App Router)
Hosting: Vercel
Fonts: Instrument Serif (headings), Space Grotesk (body)
E-commerce: Stripe Checkout integration

## Network
Part of The Voice of Cash media network:
- thevoiceofcash.com — Flagship brand
- jewsa.com — Jewish-American pride merch
- allahican.com — Muslim-American pride
- hindusa.com — Hindu-American pride
- u-god.com — Multi-faith sacred texts and theology
- webearish.com — Autism advocacy and neurodiversity
- aiskillsagents.com — AI skills marketplace
- autismacceptance.world — Autism acceptance advocacy

## Policies
- No cure narrative on any network sites
- Identity-first language on disability content
- Faith-forward, not preachy
- Inclusive of all denominations
